ud5.9:1.0.1: Thus I heard:At one time the Gracious One was walking on walking tour amongst the Kosalans, together with a great Community of monks. Then at that time a great many young brāhmaṇas were passing by not far from the Gracious One in a mocking manner. The Gracious One saw those many young brāhmaṇas passing by not far away in a mocking manner.
ud5.9:1.0.2: Then the Gracious One, having understood the significance of it, on that occasion uttered this exalted utterance:
